description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in Travelon Express 6.2.2 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the hid parameter to (1) holiday.php or (2) holiday_book.php, (3) id parameter to pages.php, (4) fid parameter to admin/airline-edit.php, or (5) cid parameter to admin/customer-edit.php.
